subject: Fw: RR sport pic
body:
Good morning! Larry and I went to Range Rover yesterday and test drove a couple models. They have a regular RR and a sports edition. This one is a Sport Limited Edition Supercharged that they only made 250 of. It looks much sleeker than the normal sport edition. They have one available on the floor. It only comes in the one colorway..What do you think? It's about $81,000(do you think that's too high for an suv?)Larry called the Palm Beach Range Rover dealer and asked about them; they said they sold out in no time for over $90,000 b/c they were in such high demand..
Would you like to come look at it with me today again? They are on 11th Ave. btwn 54 and 55th..
-----Forwarded Message-----

>From: LVJET@aol.com
>Sent: Oct 31, 2007 7:05 PM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: RR sport pic
